truth_model_proof.single_source_of_truth_for_main_active_p: dashboard.html -> renderUnifiedPositions() -> buildOpenPaperPositions(trades, shadowRecs), where trades comes from /api/trades and buildOpenPaperPositions filters to t.status === 'open' only
role_of_shadow_now: Optional enrichment of executed paper positions via matching market_slug
Not a standalone source of active position cards
truth_model_proof.remaining_shadow_competition_paths: None found in current main positions path. sourceBadge() still knows how to render SHADOW badges, but renderUnifiedPositions() no longer creates shadow-only position cards.
truth_model_proof.canonical_count_ownership: pos-count, kpi-open, and cmd-open are all set from openPaperPositions.length inside renderUnifiedPositions()

lifecycle_semantics.status_chip: OPEN / resolved states shaped from trade status + pnl outcome
lifecycle_semantics.source_labels: PAPER-BOT / PAPER-MODEL / MANUAL for executed trades; shadow remains diagnostic-only
lifecycle_semantics.resolved_presentation: main active panel shows open paper positions only; trade log/manual/debug views hold broader lifecycle context

tiny_fix_applied.change: renderState() now sets cmd-open and kpi-open to a transient placeholder ('…') instead of writing competing state-based counts before renderUnifiedPositions() applies canonical DB/open-paper-trade truth.
tiny_fix_applied.reason: This removes the last visible count-ownership ambiguity without redesigning the dashboard.

notes: The dashboard truth chain is now closed as a single coherent paper-truth model.
